name: Foundation Tempus / Euroguidance Serbia
notes: Scope: National; Focus area: Erasmus+ coordination, Euroguidance/Europass career and mobility counseling; Audience: University students; school counselors; Partnership: Joint webinars on EU mobility and credit transfer; list UNIC programs in Euroguidance feeds; Status: High priority - outreach pending; Last reviewed: 2025-12-20.

name: EducationUSA Serbia
notes: Scope: Belgrade and Novi Sad centers (national virtual reach); Focus area: Advising on study abroad, testing, and financial aid; Audience: High school and university applicants; counselors; Partnership: Co-host financing sessions comparing US vs EU options; advisor familiarization webinars; Status: High priority - schedule intro; Last reviewed: 2025-12-20.

name: Fund for Young Talents ('Dositeja')
notes: Scope: National; Focus area: Scholarships for top students (domestic and international master's); Audience: High-achieving undergraduates and master's students; Partnership: Align UNIC programs with eligible fields; info sessions for scholarship recipients; Status: High priority - map to next call; Last reviewed: 2025-12-20.

name: Studenica Foundation
notes: Scope: National with diaspora mentors; Focus area: Scholarships and mentorship for Serbian students; Audience: High-performing students in STEM/social sciences/humanities; Partnership: Scholarship top-ups and mentorship integration for UNIC admits; Status: Medium-High - propose co-funding; Last reviewed: 2025-12-20.

name: Ana and Vlade Divac Foundation
notes: Scope: National, strong regional outreach; Focus area: Scholarships and youth empowerment funds; Audience: Low-income and regional youth; scholarship recipients; Partnership: Regional webinars and travel bursaries for Divac scholars admitted to UNIC; Status: Medium - request partner mapping; Last reviewed: 2025-12-20.

name: Center for Education Policy
notes: Scope: National (policy and training projects); Focus area: Education policy research and counselor/teacher training; Audience: School counselors; educators; policymakers; Partnership: Embed UNIC pathways in training modules; co-author policy briefs on mobility; Status: Medium - explore project slot; Last reviewed: 2025-12-20.
